hook.l1: A summer BBQ, all in Dutch.
hook.l2: They laughed. You missed it again.
hook.emphasis: One question pulls you into the joke.

lines.speaker: Joost
lines.nl: Haha, en de hele tent valt zo om!
lines.en: Haha, and the whole tent just falls over!

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.nl: Wacht, wat is er zo grappig?

lines.speaker: Joost
lines.nl: Ik leg het uit. Je gaat lachen, echt!
lines.en: I'll explain. You're going to laugh, really!

outro.cta: Save it for the next BBQ.
